draft.subject: Vrijen, re: Careerspan perk from Marvin Ventures
draft.body:
Hi Vrijen,

Thanks for reaching out through Marvin Ventures. I hear you on the resume overload—it's one of the most draining parts of founder hiring.

Congrats on what you're building at Careerspan.

At Careerspan, we help founders like you cut through the noise in hiring—especially for that critical first wave of roles where every hire matters.

Given you mentioned 1-2, I'd love to learn more about what you're looking for and see if we can help.

Worth a quick chat?

Best,
Vrijen

P.S. As a Marvin Ventures member, you have a complimentary consultation credit. Happy to put it to good use.

recipient.name: Vrijen Attawar
hiring_pain_points: I'm spending too much time reading resumes (especially bad ones)
My ATS isn't helping me narrow down candidates meaningfully

person.headline: Helping 🌖🚀 Companies Hire 🦄 Talent | Founder & CEO, Careerspan

company.name: Careerspan
company.description: Careerspan offers personalized AI coaching to fill the career guidance void: helping users identify strengths, translate their skills into a compelling story on their applications, and navigate the job search process. Its goal is to enhance confidence, secure better jobs, and ensure equal opportunities for everyone.
